importHeader: Create a project by importing tasks
importSubHeader: Import from Asana, Jira, Trello, Monday.com, or CSV.
cantFindAppDesc: If you don't see your app here, select CSV to use any CSV file to import your data.
selectCsv: Select a CSV file to import

auth.asanaBody: We'll open Asana's consent screen to grant access to your projects and tasks.
auth.asanaHint: Opens a new tab to Asana
auth.mondayBody: Paste a personal access token to let Worklenz fetch boards and items for import.
auth.trelloBody: Enter your Trello API key and token so Worklenz can fetch your boards.
auth.clickupBody: Choose the ClickUp workspace to connect. We'll request access to read your spaces, folders, lists, and tasks for import.

importStep.selectListHelp: Select the workspace and list/board you'd like to import data from. Required fields are marked with an asterisk.
importStep.jiraDomainSelectionTooltip: This is the Jira site you authenticated with. The project list below comes from this domain.
importStep.jiraDomainSelectionTooltipAriaLabel: Information about the Jira domain field
importStep.jiraProjectSelectionTooltip: Choose the Jira project to import. We use this selection to fetch issues, fields, and mappings for the import.
importStep.jiraProjectSelectionTooltipAriaLabel: Information about the Jira project selector
importStep.trelloBoardRequired: Please select a Trello board before importing.
importStep.trelloCredentialsMissing: Missing Trello credentials. Please reconnect and try again.
importStep.mondayBoardRequired: Please select a Monday board before importing.
importStep.mondayCredentialsMissing: Missing Monday credentials. Please reconnect and try again.
importStep.setupProjectTitle: Set up a project in Worklenz
importStep.setupProjectDesc: Your team's data from {{source}} will be imported into a new project. Review the project name before continuing.
importStep.projectDefaultsInfo: Default project settings will be applied automatically during import.
importStep.sectionsMapped: Sections from {{source}} are mapped to Status
importStep.importMembersDesc: Brings collaborators into the Worklenz project
importStep.importAttachmentsDesc: Includes file attachments from the source project
importStep.taskTitleRequired: Task name / Title mapping is required. Map at least one CSV column to Task name / Title.
importStep.uploadCsvHelp: Start by finding the Download or Export option in your app and export a CSV file.
importStep.structureCsvSuffix: to ensure the data is in the right format and upload it to begin.
importStep.csvReadError: We could not read this CSV file. Please try another file.
importStep.fileEncodingHelp: The character encoding of your CSV file.
importStep.delimiterHelp: The character that separates values in your CSV file.
importStep.mapFieldsDescription: We've automatically mapped several CSV columns to Worklenz fields. Review the mappings and map any unmapped columns.
importStep.dateParsingOptional: Use these only if imported dates look incorrect. By default, we try to infer values from your CSV and browser settings.
importStep.customColumnHint: Need a custom column? Type a new name in the Worklenz field box while mapping.
importStep.uploadCsvToMapFields: Upload a CSV file to map fields.
importStep.selectOrTypeField: Select or type a field to map
importStep.mapValuesHelp: Build more structure into your space by mapping values in your Status column to Worklenz statuses.
importStep.noStatusValuesFound: No values found in the mapped Status column.
importStep.selectStatusColumnPrompt: Map a CSV column to Status to see values.
importStep.noUsersInCsvTitle: There are no users in the CSV file
importStep.noUsersInCsvDescription: You can proceed with import, or restart with a CSV that includes user data. If you proceed:
importStep.noUsersImpact: Assignee/reporter fields remain unassigned, mentions become plain text, and commenter names become Anonymous.
importStep.addUsersHelp: Enter a valid email address for each user. Users without valid emails won't be imported.
importStep.reviewSpaceDetailsHelp: We're ready to import your team's data. Here's a summary of what will be imported into Worklenz.
importStep.reviewProjectCardDescription: A new Worklenz project will be created for this import.
importStep.reviewFieldsCardDescription: {{mapped}} columns will be mapped to existing Worklenz fields.
importStep.reviewWorkTypesCardDescription: If values are not mapped to Worklenz statuses, all tasks are mapped to Task (level 0) by default.
importStep.reviewUsersNoneDescription: You haven't added users to the space. Assignee/reporter fields will be unassigned and @mentions become plain text.
importStep.reviewUsersAddedDescription: Users will be added to the space.
importStep.reviewWorkItemsCardDescription: Each row of the CSV data will be imported as a task.
importStep.limitationsJiraCommentFormat: Rich-text comments are imported as plain text when advanced formatting is not supported.
importStep.limitationsJiraAttachmentPermission: Attachments can be skipped if source file permissions or URLs are inaccessible.
importStep.limitationsJiraUserAttribution: Comment and assignee attribution depends on matching users by email or mapped identity.
importStep.limitationsAsanaSections: Section values are mapped to statuses and may require manual refinement.
importStep.limitationsAsanaLikes: Likes are imported as field values; reactions do not create social activity in Worklenz.
importStep.limitationsAsanaUsers: Users who are not added to the team remain unresolved in assignee and reporter mappings.
importStep.limitationsGenericMapping: Field mappings may require manual adjustment after import.
importStep.limitationsGenericUsers: Unmatched users remain unresolved until they are added and mapped in Worklenz.
importStep.limitationsGenericAttachments: Attachment import depends on source permissions and provider API availability.
importStep.limitationsCsvFormatting: CSV formulas and visual formatting are not imported; only cell values are used.
importStep.limitationsCsvDates: Date parsing uses detected formats and may need manual field/status adjustments after import.
importStep.limitationsCsvUsers: User references without valid emails stay unassigned until users are matched in Worklenz.
importStep.downloadConfigurationSuffix: to use the same space preferences in your next import.
importStep.importingHeadline: We're mapping out the new project
importStep.importingSubhead: Take a quick break and we'll do the rest. We'll take you to the project once it's ready.
importStep.importStarted: Import started. We will notify once ready.
importStep.csvMissing: Please upload a CSV file before importing.
